author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 11 APPROVE (clean). 3 BROKEN ml ranking-metric tests (#1069-#1071) strengthened via Phase 2 sklearn-fixture pattern: imperfect siblings for LRAP (expected≈0.3333) and LRL (expected=1.0) with sklearn-derived values via regenerate_ml_fixtures.py extension; inline cross-discrimination on NDCG perfect (shuffled-score < perfect, < 0.99). No ferrolearn divergence surfaced — all 3 metrics agree with sklearn 1.5.2 within 1e-9. Sabotage demo: LRAP imperfect expected 0.3333 → 0.5 caught by check_f64 with 1.667e-1 diff. No src/ changes, no new workspace deps.
